---
name: Safety issue
about: Define or tighten context safety, policy, evidence, or guard behavior.
title: ""
labels: "documentation, 策略"
assignees: ""
---

## Background

Describe the safety, policy, evidence, or context risk.

## Goal

State the guardrail or policy outcome to establish.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] The invariant or policy is stated in actionable terms.
- [ ] Affected workflows, templates, scripts, or skills are named.
- [ ] Evidence handling distinguishes inline summaries from artifact locators.
- [ ] Remaining risk or deferred enforcement is explicit.

## Non-goals

- None yet.

## Context Safety

- [ ] No full artifact, old thread, log, diff, or report is pasted inline.
- [ ] Evidence uses compact summaries plus paths, URLs, commits, or run IDs.
